creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
> Hi Emanuel
> 
> Sorry it has taken me a little while to get back to you

No worries.
 
> Here is my much simpler patch for rsync to enable the time-limit
> patch while dealing with the clash with the flags patch just using an
> IGNORE
> 
> Let me know if it is what you were thinking

I committed it with minor modifications (default off).

Cheers,
Emanuel
